content:
Alert when camera’s visibility is compromised. In real-time.

2 min read
Just now

--

With decades of experience in the real-time monitoring space, we have seen firsthand the vulnerability caused by view obstructions at critical monitoring locations.
We are proud to announce the launch of Visibility Is Compromised (VIC), powered by Umbo Light. This new feature solves the problem of view obstruction in real-time, ensuring your property remains truly protected.
A new option to select Visibility Is Compromised in TruePlatformThe Dual Threat of Blind Spots
Camera obstructions typically fall into two categories, both of which VIC is designed to tackle instantly:
1. Passive & Environmental Obstructions
Over time or due to sudden environment shifts, camera views can be degraded by factors beyond your control. VIC automatically detects these issues. Here are some examples:

• Spider webs spun across the lens

• Overgrown tree branches or foliage

• Dirty or smudged lenses

• Blinding reflections and harsh, direct light sources
2. Malicious Compromise
Intruders often lay the groundwork for a future break-in or attempt to blind cameras during an active heist. VIC triggers an immediate alert the moment someone tampers with, covers, or redirects a camera, neutralizing the threat before they can slip away unnoticed.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

See all VIC alerts in Event HistoryStreamlined Monitoring Efficiency
VIC works 24/7 with real-time alerts to minimize the risk of missed detections. To keep your security operations center running smoothly, we have taken monitoring operation’s workflow into consideration:
💡 Dedicated Alert Queue: Visibility Is Compromised alerts are routed into a separate, dedicated queue — completely apart from your Someone Is Here and Vehicle Is Here streams. This ensures your operators can quickly triage camera health and tampering issues without cluttering active human or vehicle tracking workflows.
Zero Configuration. Maximum Accuracy.
True to our core philosophy, we believe that advanced security must be simple and deployable.

• 100% Configure-less: There is no tedious calibration or sensitivity tweaking to set. VIC works right out of the box.

• Total Flexibility: You have the freedom to toggle VIC on for specific high-risk sites, or turn it on globally to protect your entire camera fleet.

• Industry-Leading Precision: As part of Umbo Light, VIC has the highest detection accuracy in the industry, drastically reducing false positives while ensuring real threats are caught instantly.
Visibility Is Compromised is now available. Contact us at support@umbocv.com today to active VIC and secure your blind spots.
